description: iNEMO 9-axis IMU: 3D accelerometer + 3D gyroscope + 3D magnetometer, I2C/SPI

fields.name: ID
fields.description: Device ID

fields.name: SLEEP_ON_INACT
fields.description: Gyroscope operating mode during inactivity. Default:0

fields.name: ACT_THS
fields.description: Activity threshold. Default:0000000

fields.name: REF
fields.description: Reference value

fields.name: INT1_IG_G
fields.description: Gyroscope interrupt enable on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_IG_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer interrupt generator on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_FSS5
fields.description: FSS5 interrupt enable on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_OVR
fields.description: Overrun interrupt on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold interrupt on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_Boot
fields.description: Boot status available on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_DRDY_G
fields.description: Gyroscope data ready on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_DRDY_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer data ready on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: RSVD_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: INT2_INACT
fields.description: Inactivity interrupt output signal. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupt events have been generated)

fields.name: INT2_FSS5
fields.description: FSS5 interrupt enable on INT2_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_OVR
fields.description: Overrun interrupt on INT2_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold interrupt on INT2_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DRDY_TEMP
fields.description: Temperature data ready on INT2_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DRDY_G
fields.description: Gyroscope data ready on INT2_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DRDY_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer data ready on INT2_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: IG_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer interrupt output signal. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupt events have been generated)

fields.name: IG_G
fields.description: Gyroscope interrupt output signal. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupt events have been generated)

fields.name: INACT
fields.description: Inactivity interrupt output signal. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupt events have been generated)

fields.name: BOOT_STATUS
fields.description: Boot running flag signal. Default value: 0 (0: no boot running; 1: boot running)

fields.name: TDA
fields.description: Temperature sensor new data available. Default value: 0 (0: new data is not yet available; 1: new data is available)

fields.name: GDA
fields.description: Gyroscope new data available. Default value: 0 (0: a new set of data is not yet available; 1: a new set of data is available)

fields.name: XLDA
fields.description: Accelerometer new data available. Default value: 0 (0: a new set of data is not yet available; 1: a new set of data is available)

fields.name: RSVD_7_5
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FMODE
fields.description: FIFO mode selection bits. Default value: 000 For further details refer to Table 84.

fields.name: FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0 0000

fields.name: FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold status. (0: FIFO filling is lower than threshold level; 1: FIFO filling is equal or higher than threshold level)

fields.name: OVRN
fields.description: FIFO overrun status. (0: FIFO is not completely filled; 1: FIFO is completely filled and at least one samples has been overwritten)

fields.name: FSS
fields.description: Number of unread samples stored into FIFO. (000000: FIFO empty; 100000: FIFO full, 32 unread samples)

Gyroscope.name: CTRL_REG1_G

fields.name: RSVD_5_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ODR_G
fields.description: Gyroscope output data rate selection

fields.name: FS_G
fields.description: Gyroscope full-scale selection

fields.name: BW_G
fields.description: Gyroscope bandwidth selection

quality_issues: all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

fields.name: RSVD_7_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: INT_SEL1
fields.description: INT_SEL[1:0] - INT selection configuration. Default value: 00

fields.name: INT_SEL0
fields.description: INT_SEL[1:0] - INT selection configuration. Default value: 00

fields.name: OUT_SEL1
fields.description: OUT_SEL[1:0] - Out selection configuration. Default value: 00

fields.name: OUT_SEL0
fields.description: OUT_SEL[1:0] - Out selection configuration. Default value: 00

fields.name: RSVD_5_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: LP_mode
fields.description: Low-power mode enable. Default value: 0 (0: Low-power disabled; 1: Low-power enabled)

fields.name: HP_EN
fields.description: High-pass filter enable. Default value: 0 (0: HPF disabled; 1: HPF enabled, refer to Figure 28)

fields.name: HPCF3_G
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 0000 Refer to Table 52

fields.name: HPCF2_G
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 0000 Refer to Table 52

fields.name: HPCF1_G
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 0000 Refer to Table 52

fields.name: HPCF0_G
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 0000 Refer to Table 52

Gyroscope.name: ORIENT_CFG_G
Gyroscope.description: Angular rate sensor sign and orientation register

fields.name: RSVD_7_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: SignX_G
fields.description: Pitch axis (X) angular rate sign. Default value: 0 (0: positive sign; 1: negative sign)

fields.name: SignY_G
fields.description: Roll axis (Y) angular rate sign. Default value: 0 (0: positive sign; 1: negative sign)

fields.name: SignZ_G
fields.description: Yaw axis (Z) angular rate sign. Default value: 0 (0: positive sign; 1: negative sign)

fields.name: Orient
fields.description: Orient [2:0] Directional user orientation selection. Default value: 000

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_SRC_G
Gyroscope.description: Angular rate sensor interrupt source register

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: IA_G
fields.description: Interrupt active. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupts have been generated)

fields.name: ZH_G
fields.description: Yaw (Z) high. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Z high event has occurred)

fields.name: ZL_G
fields.description: Yaw (Z) low. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt; 1: Z low event has occurred)

fields.name: YH_G
fields.description: Roll (Y) high. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Y high event has occurred)

fields.name: YL_G
fields.description: Roll (Y) low. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Y low event has occurred)

fields.name: XH_G
fields.description: Pitch (X) high. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: X high event has occurred)

fields.name: XL_G
fields.description: Pitch (X) low. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: X low event has occurred)

fields.name: X_L
fields.description: X-axis low byte

fields.name: X_H
fields.description: X-axis high byte

fields.name: Y_L
fields.description: Y-axis low byte

fields.name: Y_H
fields.description: Y-axis high byte

fields.name: OUT_Z_L_G
fields.description: Z-axis LSB

fields.name: OUT_Z_H_G
fields.description: Z-axis MSB

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_THS_YL_G
Gyroscope.description: Gyroscope interrupt threshold Y low byte

fields.name: INT_GEN_THS_YL_G
fields.description: Threshold Y low byte

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_THS_Z_G
Gyroscope.description: Angular rate sensor interrupt generator threshold registers Z-axis

fields.name: THS_G_Z15
fields.description: Angular rate sensor interrupt thresholds on yaw (Z) axis

fields.name: THS_G_Z14
fields.description: Angular rate sensor interrupt thresholds on yaw (Z) axis

fields.name: THS_G_Z7
fields.description: Angular rate sensor interrupt thresholds on yaw (Z) axis

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_THS_ZL_G
Gyroscope.description: Gyroscope interrupt threshold Z low byte

fields.name: INT_GEN_THS_ZL_G
fields.description: Threshold Z low byte

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_DUR_G
Gyroscope.description: Angular rate sensor interrupt generator duration register

fields.name: WAIT_G
fields.description: Exit from interrupt wait function enable

fields.name: DUR_G
fields.description: Enter/exit interrupt duration value

fields.name: RSVD_2_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DEC
fields.description: Decimation of acceleration data on OUT REG and FIFO. Default value: 00 (00: no decimation; 01: update every 2 samples; 10: update every 4 samples; 11: update every 8 samples)

fields.name: ZEN_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Z-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Z-axis output disabled; 1: Z-axis output enabled)

fields.name: YEN_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Y-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Y-axis output disabled; 1: Y-axis output enabled)

fields.name: XEN_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's X-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: X-axis output disabled; 1: X-axis output enabled)

fields.name: ODR_XL
fields.description: ODR_XL2, ODR_XL1, ODR_XL0

fields.name: FS_XL
fields.description: FS1_XL, FS0_XL

fields.name: BW_SCAL_ODR
fields.description: BW_SCAL _ODR

fields.name: BW_XL
fields.description: BW_XL1, BW_XL0

fields.name: RSVD_5
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: SLEEP_G
fields.description: Gyroscope sleep mode enable

fields.name: FIFO_TEMP_EN
fields.description: Temperature data storage in FIFO enable

fields.name: DRDY_mask_bit
fields.description: Data available enable bit

fields.name: I2C_DISABLE
fields.description: Disable I2C interface

fields.name: FIFO_EN
fields.description: FIFO memory enable

fields.name: STOP_ON_FTH
fields.description: Enable FIFO threshold level use

Accelerometer.name: INT_GEN_SRC_XL
Accelerometer.description: Linear acceleration sensor interrupt source register

fields.name: IA_XL
fields.description: Interrupt active. Default value: 0. (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupts have been generated)

fields.name: ZH_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Z high event. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Z high event has occurred)

fields.name: ZL_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Z low event. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt; 1: Z low event has occurred)

fields.name: YH_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Y high event. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Y high event has occurred)

fields.name: YL_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Y low event. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Y low event has occurred)

fields.name: XH_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's X high event. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: X high event has occurred)

fields.name: XL_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's X low. event. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: X low event has occurred)

fields.name: bit7
fields.description: Bit7

fields.description: X-axis LSB

Accelerometer.description: Magnetic sensor X-axis output low byte

fields.description: X-axis LSB

fields.name: OUT_Y_L_XL
fields.description: Y-axis LSB

Accelerometer.description: Magnetic sensor Y-axis output low byte

fields.name: OUT_Y_L_M
fields.description: Y-axis LSB

fields.name: OUT_Z_L_XL
fields.description: Z-axis LSB

Accelerometer.description: Magnetic sensor Z-axis output low byte

fields.description: Z-axis LSB

Magnetometer.name: OFFSET_X_REG_M
Magnetometer.description: X offset register to compensate environmental effects (data is expressed as two's complement). This value acts on the magnetic output data value in order to subtract the environmental offset.

fields.name: OFXM
fields.description: X offset value

Magnetometer.name: INT_GEN_THS_X_XL
Magnetometer.description: Interrupt generator threshold X XL register

fields.name: THS_X
fields.description: X threshold

Magnetometer.name: OFFSET_Y_REG_L_M
Magnetometer.description: Magnetic sensor Y offset low byte

fields.name: OFFSET_Y_REG_L_M
fields.description: Y offset low byte

Magnetometer.name: OFFSET_Y_REG_M
Magnetometer.description: Y offset register to compensate environmental effects

fields.name: OFYM
fields.description: Y-axis offset value

Magnetometer.name: OFFSET_Z_REG_M
Magnetometer.description: Z offset register to compensate environmental effects

fields.name: RSVD_15_8
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: WAIT_XL
fields.description: Wait function enabled on duration counter. Default value: 0 (0: wait function off; 1: wait for DUR_XL [6:0] samples before exiting interrupt)

fields.name: DUR_XL
fields.description: Enter/exit interrupt duration value. Default value: 000 0000

fields.name: RSVD_2_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FS1
fields.description: Full-scale configuration. Default value: 00 Refer to Table 114

fields.name: REBOOT
fields.description: Reboot memory content. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reboot memory content)

fields.name: SOFT_RST
fields.description: Configuration registers and user register reset function. (0: default value; 1: reset operation)

fields.name: I2C_DISABLE
fields.description: Disable I^2 C interface. Default value 0. (0: I^2 C enable; 1: I^2 C disable)

fields.name: LP
fields.description: Low-power mode configuration. Default value: 0 If this bit is '1', the DO[2:0] is set to 0.625 Hz and the system performs, for each channel, the minimum number of averages. Once the bit is set to '0', the magnetic data rate is configured by the DO bits in the CTRL_REG1_M (20h) register.

fields.name: SIM
fields.description: SPI Serial Interface mode selection. Default value: 0 (0: SPI only write operations enabled; 1: SPI read and write operations enable).

fields.name: MD1
fields.description: Operating mode selection. Default value: 11 Refer to Table 117.

fields.name: MD0
fields.description: Operating mode selection. Default value: 11 Refer to Table 117.

fields.name: RSVD_6_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: BDU
fields.description: Block data update for magnetic data. Default value: 0 (0: continuous update; 1: output registers not updated until MSB and LSB have been read)

fields.name: ZYXOR
fields.description: X, Y and Z-axis data overrun. Default value: 0 (0: no overrun has occurred; 1: a new set of data has overwritten the previous set)

fields.name: ZOR
fields.description: Z-axis data overrun. Default value: 0 (0: no overrun has occurred; 1: new data for the Z-axis has overwritten the previous data)

fields.name: YOR
fields.description: Y-axis data overrun. Default value: 0 (0: no overrun has occurred; 1: new data for the Y-axis has overwritten the previous data)

fields.name: XOR
fields.description: X-axis data overrun. Default value: 0 (0: no overrun has occurred; 1: new data for the X-axis has overwritten the previous data)

fields.name: ZYXDA
fields.description: X, Y and Z-axis new data available. Default value: 0 (0: a new set of data is not yet available; 1: a new set of data is available)

fields.name: ZDA
fields.description: Z-axis new data available. Default value: 0 (0: new data for the Z-axis is not yet available; 1: new data for the Z-axis is available)

fields.name: YDA
fields.description: Y-axis new data available. Default value: 0 (0: new data for the Y-axis is not yet available; 1: new data for the Y-axis is available)

fields.name: XDA
fields.description: X-axis new data available. Default value: 0 (0: a new data for the X-axis is not yet available; 1: a new data for the X-axis is available)

fields.name: RSVD_4
fields.description: Reserved (0)

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved (0)

fields.name: XIEN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on X-axis. Default value: 0 0: disable interrupt request; 1: enable interrupt request

fields.name: YIEN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on Y-axis. Default value: 0 0: disable interrupt request; 1: enable interrupt request

fields.name: ZIEN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on Z-axis. Default value: 0 0: disable interrupt request; 1: enable interrupt request

fields.name: IEA
fields.description: Interrupt active configuration on INT_MAG. Default value: 0 0: low; 1: high

fields.name: IEL
fields.description: Latch interrupt request. Default value: 0 0: interrupt request latched; 1: interrupt request not latched. Once latched, the INT_M pin remains in the same state until INT_SRC_M (31h) is read.

fields.name: IEN
fields.description: Interrupt enable on the INT_M pin. Default value: 0 0: disable; 1: enable

fields.name: INT
fields.description: This bit signals when the interrupt event occurs.

fields.name: MROI
fields.description: Internal measurement range overflow on magnetic value. Default value: 0

fields.name: NTH_Z
fields.description: Value on Z-axis exceeds the threshold on the negative side. Default value: 0

fields.name: NTH_Y
fields.description: Value on Y-axis exceeds the threshold on the negative side. Default value: 0

fields.name: NTH_X
fields.description: Value on X-axis exceeds the threshold on the negative side. Default value: 0

fields.name: PTH_Z
fields.description: Value on Z-axis exceeds the threshold on the positive side. Default value: 0

fields.name: PTH_Y
fields.description: Value on Y-axis exceeds the threshold on the positive side. Default value: 0

fields.name: PTH_X
fields.description: Value on X-axis exceeds the threshold on the positive side. Default value: 0

fields.name: RSVD_15
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: THS
fields.description: Interrupt threshold value

fields.name: TEMP_L
fields.description: Temperature low byte

Magnetometer (M).name: INT_THS_H_M
Magnetometer (M).description: Statistics counter (from manifest, no field details in source)

fields.name: int_ths_h_m
fields.description: Int ths h m

fields.name: AOI_XL
fields.description: AND/OR combination of accelerometer's interrupt events. Default value: 0 (0: OR combination; 1:AND combination)

fields.name: 6D
fields.description: 6-direction detection function for interrupt. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: ZHIE_XL
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on accelerometer's Z-axis high event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: interrupt request on measured acceleration value higher than preset threshold)

fields.name: ZLIE_XL
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on accelerometer's Z-axis low event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: interrupt request on measured acceleration value lower than preset threshold)

fields.name: YHIE_XL
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on accelerometer's Y-axis high event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: interrupt request on measured acceleration value higher than preset threshold)

fields.name: YLIE_XL
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on accelerometer's Y-axis low event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: interrupt request on measured acceleration value lower than preset threshold)

fields.name: XHIE_XL
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on accelerometer's X-axis high event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: interrupt request on measured acceleration value higher than preset threshold)

fields.name: XLIE_XL
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on accelerometer's X-axis low event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: interrupt request on measured acceleration value lower than preset threshold)

Accelerometer (XL).name: 7.5 INT_GEN_THS_Y_XL
Accelerometer (XL).description: 7.5 INT GEN THS Y XL register

fields.name: THS_XL_Y
fields.description: Y-axis interrupt threshold. Default value: 0000 0000

fields.name: WAIT_XL
fields.description: Wait function enabled on duration counter. Default value: 0 (0: wait function off; 1: wait for DUR_XL [6:0] samples before exiting interrupt)

fields.name: DUR_XL
fields.description: Enter/exit interrupt duration value. Default value: 000 0000

fields.name: RSVD_4_2
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: XEN_G
fields.description: Gyroscope's pitch axis (X) output enable. Default value: 1 (0: X-axis output disabled; 1: X-axis output enabled)

fields.name: YEN_G
fields.description: Gyroscope's roll axis (Y) output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Y-axis output disabled; 1: Y-axis output enabled)

fields.name: Zen_G
fields.description: Gyroscope's Yaw axis (Z) output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Z-axis output disabled; 1: Z-axis output enabled)

fields.name: LIR_XL1
fields.description: Latched Interrupt. Default value: 0 (0: interrupt request not latched; 1: interrupt request latched)

fields.name: 4D_XL1
fields.description: 4D option enabled on Interrupt. Default value: 0 (0: interrupt generator uses 6D for position recognition; 1: interrupt generator uses 4D for position recognition)
